papers.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught

papers.abstract_zh: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.
